name: github
description: GitHub App integration. Push code, create/update/list PRs, comment on PRs.

config.name: private_key
config.description: PEM RSA private key content (or use private_key_path)

config.name: private_key_path
config.description: Path to PEM RSA private key file

config.name: branch_prefix
config.description: Required prefix for agent branches (default: agent/)

config.name: protected_refs
config.description: Comma-separated glob patterns for protected branches (default: main,master,release/*)
